title: Nucleation of Sachdev-Ye-Kitaev Clusters in One Spatial Dimension
summary: We study how Sachdev-Ye-Kitaev (SYK) interactions can arise from localized single-particle states on a system that is effectively one dimensional. If a local interaction is projected onto coarse localized orbitals, the resulting couplings do not immediately follow the standard SYK distribution. Instead, they have a finite probability of being exactly zero, a broad non-Gaussian distribution for the nonzero values, and strong correlations coming from the geometry of the localized states. We then show that this changes when each localization volume is resolved into $M>1$ smaller microscopic pieces with random phases. As $M$ increases, the distribution of the nonzero couplings moves toward the complex-Gaussian SYK form. At the same time, the large-$M$ limit is a sparse but asymptotically canonical SYK network: the nonzero couplings create SYK clusters, while the pattern of missing or very weak couplings is still determined by the real-space overlap of the localized orbitals. Finally, we map the interaction tensor to a graph in pair space. This makes it possible to follow the formation, merger, and growth of SYK clusters, which we characterize using connected components and clique/simplex counts. The result is a minimal real-space phenomenological theory of SYK-cluster formation, providing clear experimental criteria.

AI.tldr: 该研究探讨了SYK相互作用如何从一维系统中的局域单粒子态产生，揭示了相互作用张量如何随局域轨道分辨率变化而演化为稀疏但渐近规范的SYK网络，并提出了SYK团簇形成的实空间唯象理论。
AI.motivation: 研究SYK相互作用如何从实际物理系统中的局域单粒子态产生，理解相互作用张量如何受局域轨道几何结构影响，以及如何演化为标准的SYK分布。
AI.method: 将局域相互作用投影到粗粒化的局域轨道上，分析耦合分布特征；通过将每个局域体积分解为M个具有随机相位的微观片段，研究耦合分布随M增大的演化；将相互作用张量映射到对空间中的图结构，使用连通分量和团/单纯形计数来表征SYK团簇的形成、合并和生长。
AI.result: 粗粒化局域轨道上的耦合分布偏离标准SYK分布：存在零耦合的有限概率、非零值的非高斯分布以及来自局域态几何结构的强相关性。随着M增大，非零耦合分布趋近于复高斯SYK形式。大M极限下形成稀疏但渐近规范的SYK网络：非零耦合创建SYK团簇，而缺失或弱耦合模式仍由局域轨道的实空间重叠决定。
AI.conclusion: 该研究建立了SYK团簇形成的最小实空间唯象理论，提供了清晰的实验判据，揭示了SYK相互作用如何从局域单粒子态中涌现，以及几何结构如何影响最终相互作用网络的稀疏性和团簇结构。

title: Topological invariant of periodic many body wavefunction from charge pumping simulation
summary: Many-body topological quantum states host exotic quantum phenomena and lie at the forefront of developing next-generation quantum technologies. Recently emerged neural network wavefunction methods have established themselves as a powerful computational framework for accessing these states, enabling the variational machine learning calculation of the system's ground state wavefunction. However, reliable computation of topological invariants remains an open challenge when the whole deterministic energy spectrum is not available. In this work, we introduce a robust approach to determining topological invariant based on simulating the charge pumping process, by monitoring the response of polarization upon flux insertion. By applying this method, we accurately extract the Chern numbers for Abelian fractional Chern insulators. Our approach also enables the first neural-network-wavefunction-based identification of anomalous composite Fermi liquid states. Our work resolves a key bottleneck in applying neural network wavefunctions to correlated topological matter, and the method proposed is also generally applicable to other many-body approaches, thereby opening up new avenues for future research in this field.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于电荷泵浦模拟的拓扑不变量计算方法，解决了神经网络波函数方法中拓扑不变量计算的难题，成功应用于阿贝尔分数量子霍尔态和反常复合费米液体态的识别。
AI.motivation: 神经网络波函数方法已成为研究多体拓扑量子态的有力工具，但计算拓扑不变量仍面临挑战，特别是在无法获得完整确定性能谱的情况下。需要一种可靠的方法来提取拓扑不变量。
AI.method: 通过模拟电荷泵浦过程，监测通量插入时的极化响应，从而确定拓扑不变量。该方法基于极化对通量插入的响应来计算陈数。
AI.result: 成功准确地提取了阿贝尔分数量子陈绝缘体的陈数，并首次基于神经网络波函数识别了反常复合费米液体态。
AI.conclusion: 解决了神经网络波函数应用于关联拓扑物质的关键瓶颈，提出的方法也适用于其他多体方法，为该领域未来研究开辟了新途径。

title: Evolution of crystal field and intraionic interactions in the ilmenite $A$IrO$_3$ ($A$ = Mg, Zn, Cd) and hyperhoneycomb $β$-ZnIrO$_3$
summary: Spin-orbit Mott insulators with the $t_{2g}^5$ electron configuration are promising platforms for the Kitaev spin liquid, yet fine-tuning of their crystal structures is essential to suppress non-Kitaev interactions. Here, we investigate the local electronic structures of the ilmenite iridates $A\mathrm{IrO}_3$ ($A = \mathrm{Mg}, \mathrm{Zn}, \mathrm{Cd}$) and the hyperhoneycomb $β\text{-}\mathrm{ZnIrO}_3$ using Ir $L_3$-edge resonant inelastic x-ray scattering (RIXS). Multiplet analysis of the RIXS spectra reveals a systematic evolution of the crystal field and intraionic interaction parameters upon chemical substitution at the $A$-site. We observe an enhancement of the trigonal distortion with increasing $A$-site ionic radius. This provides a microscopic explanation for the deviation from the ideal $J=1/2$ state and the antiferromagnetic interactions identified in $\mathrm{CdIrO}_3$. Furthermore, the local multiplet parameters of ilmenite $\mathrm{ZnIrO}_3$ and hyperhoneycomb $β\text{-}\mathrm{ZnIrO}_3$ are found to be nearly identical, demonstrating that their different magnetic ground states are primarily governed by their distinct lattice structures rather than the single-ion properties. These findings establish a solid foundation for understanding how local crystal-field distortions control the magnetic Hamiltonian in Kitaev candidate materials.

AI.tldr: 通过RIXS研究ilmenite iridates和hyperhoneycomb β-ZnIrO₃的局域电子结构，发现A位离子半径增大增强三角畸变，解释了CdIrO₃偏离理想J=1/2态和反铁磁相互作用的微观机制。
AI.motivation: t₂g⁵电子构型的自旋轨道Mott绝缘体是Kitaev自旋液体的候选材料，但需要精细调控晶体结构以抑制非Kitaev相互作用。研究不同A位离子对局域电子结构的影响，理解晶体场畸变如何控制磁性哈密顿量。
AI.method: 使用Ir L₃边共振非弹性X射线散射(RIXS)研究ilmenite iridates AIrO₃(A=Mg, Zn, Cd)和hyperhoneycomb β-ZnIrO₃的局域电子结构。通过多重态分析RIXS谱，系统研究A位化学取代对晶体场和离子内相互作用参数的影响。
AI.result: 1. A位离子半径增大增强三角畸变；2. 这解释了CdIrO₃偏离理想J=1/2态和反铁磁相互作用的微观机制；3. ilmenite ZnIrO₃和hyperhoneycomb β-ZnIrO₃的局域多重态参数几乎相同，表明它们不同的磁性基态主要由不同的晶格结构而非单离子性质决定。
AI.conclusion: 研究建立了理解局域晶体场畸变如何控制Kitaev候选材料中磁性哈密顿量的坚实基础，表明晶格结构在决定磁性基态中起主导作用，为材料设计提供了重要指导。

title: Superconductivity and competing orders in honeycomb $t$-$J$ model: interplay of lattice geometry and next-nearest-neighbor hopping
summary: We investigate the extended $t$-$J$ model on honeycomb lattices with next-nearest-neighbor (NNN) electron hopping $t'$ and superexchange coupling $J'=(t'/t)^2 J$ using large-scale density-matrix renormalization group (DMRG) simulations and slave-boson mean-field theory (SBMFT). By systematically varying $t'$ and cylinder geometries, our DMRG results reveal several competing phases with distinct charge and superconducting (SC) properties. On YC4-0 cylinders possessing bonds lying along $\vec{e}_y$ direction, the ground state of doped models exhibits pronounced quasi-long-range $d$-wave SC with coexisting armchair-oriented stripes (a-stripe) across a broad range of $t'$. Notably, the SC Luttinger exponent has a non-monotonic dependence on $t'$, showing an optimal $t'_{op}\sim0.4$ for dominant SC. Conversely, XC cylinders host a competing long-range zigzag stripes phase without SC for $t'>0.5$, highlighting the role of boundary geometry in stabilizing distinct competing phases in DMRG. To elucidate the stability of all these competing phases in 2D limit, we employ SBMFT and identify the a-stripe as the stable configuration across most of phase diagram, with a transition to uniform nematic $d$-wave SC at large $t'$ for $δ=1/8$. The combined results from two complementary approaches suggest a robust $t'$-induced SC phase that might remain stable in doped extended $t$-$J$ model on the honeycomb lattice.

AI.tldr: 在蜂窝晶格上研究扩展t-J模型，通过DMRG和SBMFT发现t'诱导的d波超导相与条纹相竞争，边界几何影响相稳定性。
AI.motivation: 研究蜂窝晶格上扩展t-J模型中次近邻跃迁t'和超交换耦合J'对电荷和超导性质的影响，探索不同几何边界条件下的竞争相。
AI.method: 使用大规模密度矩阵重整化群(DMRG)模拟和slave-boson平均场理论(SBMFT)，系统变化t'和圆柱几何，分析电荷和超导性质。
AI.result: 在YC4-0圆柱上发现准长程d波超导与armchair条纹共存，SC Luttinger指数对t'呈非单调依赖，最优t'约0.4；XC圆柱上t'>0.5时存在无超导的zigzag条纹相；SBMFT表明a-stripe在大部分相图中稳定，大t'时过渡到均匀向列d波超导。
AI.conclusion: 扩展t-J模型在蜂窝晶格上存在由t'诱导的稳健超导相，边界几何显著影响竞争相的稳定性，a-stripe配置在二维极限下稳定。

title: Floquet Engineering of a Quasiequilibrium Superradiant Phase Transition in Landau Polaritons
summary: Superradiant phase transitions (SRPTs), characterized by photon condensation and macroscopic matter polarization, are forbidden in equilibrium for homogeneous fields by no-go theorems. Here, we show that Floquet driving can circumvent this constraint in a Landau polariton system consisting of a two-dimensional electron gas coupled to a terahertz cavity in a DC magnetic field. An off-resonant AC magnetic field modulates the cyclotron frequency and light--matter coupling strength while leaving the diamagnetic term unchanged, generating an additional DC coupling contribution. This drives the system across a critical threshold into a superradiant phase, characterized by photon condensation and Landau-level polarization in the ground state of the Floquet Hamiltonian. This quasiequilibrium approach offers a route to SRPTs distinct from driven-dissipative schemes.

AI.tldr: Floquet驱动可以绕过平衡态超辐射相变的禁戒定理，在Landau极化子系统中实现超辐射相变
AI.motivation: 平衡态下均匀场的超辐射相变被禁戒定理禁止，需要寻找新的实现途径
AI.method: 在DC磁场中的二维电子气与太赫兹腔耦合系统上施加离共振AC磁场，调制回旋频率和光-物质耦合强度，产生额外的DC耦合贡献
AI.result: 系统跨越临界阈值进入超辐射相，Floquet哈密顿量的基态出现光子凝聚和Landau能级极化
AI.conclusion: Floquet驱动提供了一种实现超辐射相变的新途径，区别于驱动-耗散方案

title: Bulk-dissociated topological bands without spin-orbit coupling in hetero-dimensional superconducting metamaterials
summary: Topological superconductors (TSCs) in superconducting hybrid heterostructures, which integrate superconducting and non-superconducting materials, have been intensely investigated with the hope of discovering exotic non-Abelian anyons for fault-tolerant quantum computing. In this effort, a challenge for hybrid superconducting systems is controlling hybridization, which is often a balance between enhancing the superconducting proximity effect at the cost of suppressing desirable electronic properties such as strong spin-orbit interactions. Hence, discovering hybrid superconducting systems with topological properties controlled and enhanced by material geometry design without spin-orbit interactions would be intriguing to explore. In this work, we theoretically study a square superconducting network decorated with spin-polarized magnetic adatoms. We find that localized Yu-Shiba-Rusinov bound states at magnetic adatom sites collectively form a weak topological superconducting phase despite the absence of spin-orbit interactions. We then demonstrate that by tuning the Fermi energy of the network, the system can transition from a weak TSC phase to a bulk-dissociated TSC phase where the edge state bands separate from the bulk, giving rise to unexpected features such as nodal lines and co-existing bulk-dissociated edge and corner modes. Moreover, our findings highlight how hetero-dimensional superconducting metamaterials can serve as a useful template for controlling the coupling and dissociation between electronic degrees of freedom of different dimensionalities.

AI.tldr: 该论文理论上研究了装饰有自旋极化磁性原子的方形超导网络，发现即使在无自旋轨道相互作用的情况下，磁性原子位点的局域Yu-Shiba-Rusinov束缚态也能集体形成弱拓扑超导相，并可通过调节费米能实现向体解离拓扑超导相的转变。
AI.motivation: 当前超导混合异质结构研究面临挑战：需要在增强超导邻近效应与保持理想电子特性（如强自旋轨道相互作用）之间取得平衡。因此，探索通过材料几何设计而非自旋轨道相互作用来控制拓扑性质的混合超导系统具有重要意义。
AI.method: 理论研究了装饰有自旋极化磁性原子的方形超导网络，分析了磁性原子位点的局域Yu-Shiba-Rusinov束缚态如何集体形成拓扑超导相，并研究了通过调节网络费米能实现相变的过程。
AI.result: 发现系统在无自旋轨道相互作用的情况下能形成弱拓扑超导相；通过调节费米能可实现从弱拓扑超导相到体解离拓扑超导相的转变，后者表现出节点线、体解离边缘和角模式共存等意外特征。
AI.conclusion: 异维超导超材料可作为控制不同维度电子自由度耦合与解离的有用模板，为拓扑超导研究提供了新的设计思路，展示了材料几何设计在调控拓扑性质方面的潜力。

title: Decoding coherent errors in toric codes on honeycomb and square lattices: duality to Majorana monitored dynamics and symmetry classes
summary: Topological stabilizer codes, such as the toric and surface codes, are leading candidates for fault-tolerant quantum computation. While their decodability under stochastic noise has been extensively studied, the effects of coherent errors, which involve quantum interference, remain less explored. In this work, we study the decodability of toric codes on honeycomb and square lattices subject to $X$- and $Z$-type coherent errors generated by the $X$- and $Z$-rotations on each qubit. We establish a duality between these decoding problems and 1+1D monitored dynamics of non-interacting Majorana fermions. This duality shows that the Altland-Zirnbauer symmetry class of the dual Majorana dynamics governs the universal structure of the decodability phase diagram. We show that the honeycomb-lattice toric code (hTC) with $X$-type error is dual to class-DIII dynamics, while the hTC with $Z$-type error and the square-lattice toric code (sTC) with both error types are dual to class-D dynamics. The key distinction arises from time-reversal symmetry. In class DIII, the generic transition out of the decodable phase is dual to a measurement-induced transition between dynamical phases with area-law and logarithmic entanglement scaling. In contrast, in class D, the generic decodability transition corresponds to a transition between two topologically distinct area-law phases. To explore these transitions in microscopic models, we consider hTC and sTC with $X$-type errors as representatives and introduce a minimal two-parameter coherent error model with spatially varying rotation angles. Using analytical and numerical methods, we map out the decodability phase diagrams and characterize the universal behavior of the transitions. We find that the decodability of sTC is more vulnerable to spatially varying coherent errors than uniform ones.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了蜂窝和方格晶格上环面码在相干错误下的可解码性，建立了与Majorana费米子监控动力学的对偶关系，揭示了不同对称性类下的可解码性相变行为。
AI.motivation: 拓扑稳定子码（如环面码和表面码）是容错量子计算的主要候选方案。虽然它们在随机噪声下的可解码性已被广泛研究，但涉及量子干涉的相干错误的影响仍较少探索。本文旨在研究蜂窝和方格晶格环面码在X型和Z型相干错误下的可解码性。
AI.method: 建立相干错误解码问题与1+1维非相互作用Majorana费米子监控动力学之间的对偶关系。通过Altland-Zirnbauer对称性类分析通用相图结构。针对蜂窝晶格环面码和方格晶格环面码，引入具有空间变化旋转角度的最小两参数相干错误模型，使用分析和数值方法绘制可解码性相图。
AI.result: 发现蜂窝晶格环面码的X型错误对偶于DIII类动力学，而Z型错误及方格晶格环面码的两种错误类型对偶于D类动力学。DIII类中可解码相变对应面积律和对数纠缠标度的动力学相变，而D类中对应两个拓扑不同的面积律相之间的转变。数值分析显示方格晶格环面码对空间变化相干错误比均匀错误更脆弱。
AI.conclusion: 通过建立拓扑码相干错误解码与Majorana监控动力学的对偶关系，揭示了不同对称性类下可解码性相变的普适行为。时间反演对称性的存在与否是关键区别，这为理解相干错误对拓扑量子计算的影响提供了新视角。

title: Active Learning for Generalizable Detonation Performance Prediction of Energetic Materials
summary: The discovery of new energetic materials is critical for advancing technologies from defense to private industry. However, experimental approaches remain slow and expensive while computational alternatives require accurate material property inputs that are often costly to obtain, limiting their ability to efficiently predict detonation performance across a vast chemical space. We address this challenge through an active learning strategy that integrates density functional theory calculations, thermochemical modeling, message-passing neural networks, and Bayesian optimization. The resulting high-throughput workflow iteratively expands the training dataset by selecting new molecules in a targeted manner that balances the exploration of broad chemical space with the exploitation of promising high-performing candidates. This approach yields the largest publicly available database of potential CHNO explosives drawn from an initial pool of more than 70 billion candidates and a generalizable surrogate model capable of accurately predicting detonation performance (R$^2$ > 0.98). Feature importance analysis on this largest-to-date dataset reveals that oxygen balance is the dominant driver of detonation performance, complemented by contributions from local electronic structure, density, and the presence of specific functional groups. Cheminformatics analysis highlights how energetic materials with similar performance metrics tend to cluster in distinct chemical spaces offering a clearer direction for future synthesis studies. Together, the surrogate model, database, and resulting chemical insights provide a valuable foundation for high-throughput screening and targeted discovery of new energetic materials spanning diverse and previously unexplored regions of chemical space.

AI.tldr: 开发了一个结合DFT计算、热化学建模、神经网络和贝叶斯优化的主动学习工作流，用于高效发现新型含能材料，创建了最大的CHNO炸药数据库并建立了高精度预测模型。
AI.motivation: 传统实验方法发现新型含能材料速度慢、成本高，而计算方法需要昂贵的材料属性输入数据，限制了在大规模化学空间中高效预测爆轰性能的能力。
AI.method: 采用主动学习策略，整合密度泛函理论计算、热化学建模、消息传递神经网络和贝叶斯优化，通过迭代扩展训练数据集，在探索广阔化学空间和利用高性能候选分子之间取得平衡。
AI.result: 创建了最大的公开CHNO炸药数据库（从700多亿候选分子中筛选），建立了可泛化的替代模型（R² > 0.98），特征重要性分析显示氧平衡是爆轰性能的主要驱动因素，化学信息学分析揭示了相似性能材料在化学空间中的聚类规律。
AI.conclusion: 该工作流、数据库和化学洞察为高通量筛选和靶向发现新型含能材料提供了宝贵基础，能够探索化学空间中多样且先前未开发的区域。

title: A metallic CrS$_2$ phase bridging the gap between two- and three-dimensional dichalcogenides
summary: We report on the high-pressure synthesis of a CrS$_2$ phase in the form of single-crystalline nanorods. A structural refinement of Precession Electron Diffraction Tomography data confirms the nominal CrS$_2$ composition and unveils a ladder-type structure formed by portions of 1T-type CrS$_2$ layers characteristic of two-dimensional (2D) dichalcogenides connected by chains of edge-sharing CrS$_6$ octahedra characteristic of 3D dichalcogenides with marcasite structure. Ab initio density functional theory calculations of the relaxed structure confirm the stability of this structure and indicate a strong overlap of the 3d states of Cr with the 3p states of S, thus suggesting strong covalent Cr-S bonds and metallic behavior. Electrical resistivity, $\varrho$, measurements on single nanorods confirm this behavior and yield $\varrho \sim 2-20$ m$Ω$ cm at 4 K. The proposed ladder-like structure of CrS$_2$ forms open channels along the chain direction, which may be suitable for ionic conduction.

AI.tldr: 高压合成CrS₂单晶纳米棒，发现梯状结构，兼具2D和3D二硫化物特征，具有金属导电性
AI.motivation: 探索CrS₂的新相结构，研究其电子性质和潜在应用，特别是结合2D和3D二硫化物结构特征的新型材料
AI.method: 高压合成CrS₂单晶纳米棒，使用Precession Electron Diffraction Tomography进行结构精修，结合密度泛函理论计算验证结构稳定性
AI.result: 成功合成具有梯状结构的CrS₂相，结构由1T型CrS₂层和边缘共享CrS₆八面体链组成，理论计算证实结构稳定性，电输运测量显示金属行为（4K时电阻率2-20 mΩ·cm）
AI.conclusion: CrS₂的梯状结构结合了2D和3D二硫化物的特征，具有金属导电性，其开放通道结构可能适用于离子传导应用

title: $\mathrm{U}(2)$ Chern-Simons-Ginzburg-Landau Theory of Fractional Quantum Hall Hierarchies
summary: We construct effective $\mathrm{U}(2)$ Chern-Simons-Ginzburg-Landau theories for Abelian and non-Abelian fractional quantum Hall hierarchies for those which had previously been described only through categorical data or trial wavefunctions. Our framework captures both Abelian hierarchy states built on half-filled Pfaffian-type parents and non-Abelian hierarchies emerging from Abelian states. It reproduces all filling fractions obtained from wavefunction and categorical constructions and, moreover, uniquely determines the corresponding topological orders. We also identify an intriguing particle-hole symmetry relating two hierarchy sequences, one built on a trivial insulator and the other on the $ν=1$ integer quantum Hall state, which respectively generate the Read-Rezayi sequences and their particle-hole conjugates under the same hierarchy construction.

AI.tldr: 构建了U(2) Chern-Simons-Ginzburg-Landau理论来描述阿贝尔和非阿贝尔分数量子霍尔层级结构，统一了波函数和范畴构造，确定了拓扑序，并发现了有趣的粒子-空穴对称性。
AI.motivation: 之前的分数量子霍尔层级结构（包括阿贝尔和非阿贝尔）主要通过范畴数据或尝试波函数描述，缺乏统一的场论框架。本文旨在构建一个有效的理论框架来统一描述这些层级结构。
AI.method: 构建了有效的U(2) Chern-Simons-Ginzburg-Landau理论，该框架能够同时描述基于半填充Pfaffian型母态的Abelian层级结构和从Abelian态产生的非Abelian层级结构。
AI.result: 该理论框架重现了波函数和范畴构造得到的所有填充分数，并唯一确定了相应的拓扑序。还发现了一个有趣的粒子-空穴对称性，将基于平凡绝缘体的层级序列与基于ν=1整数量子霍尔态的层级序列联系起来。
AI.conclusion: 成功构建了一个统一的U(2) Chern-Simons-Ginzburg-Landau理论框架，为分数量子霍尔层级结构提供了完整的场论描述，揭示了粒子-空穴对称性，将Read-Rezayi序列与其粒子-空穴共轭联系起来。

title: Mesoscopic transport in a Chern mosaic
summary: We analyze mesoscopic electronic transport in a Chern mosaic: a regular pattern of domains whose electronic bands carry differing local Chern numbers. An example platform where a Chern mosaic can arise is a moiré heterostructure, where variations in the local moiré parameters can produce such domains. We compute resistances at linear response for a variety of domain wall network geometries at zero temperature and magnetic field. Simple domain configurations can exhibit zero, integer, or fractional multiples of the quantum of resistance in both the longitudinal and transverse (Hall) responses. Our simple semi-classical analysis provides a useful computational method and comparative catalog for ongoing experiments in two-dimensional topological materials.

AI.tldr: 分析Chern mosaic（具有不同局部陈数的规则畴图案）中的介观电子输运，计算零温零场下各种畴壁网络几何结构的线性响应电阻，发现简单畴构型可展示零、整数或分数倍量子电阻的纵向和横向响应。
AI.motivation: 研究Chern mosaic中的电子输运特性，这种结构可由莫尔异质结中局部莫尔参数变化产生，为理解二维拓扑材料实验提供理论框架。
AI.method: 采用简单的半经典分析方法，计算零温度和零磁场条件下各种畴壁网络几何结构的线性响应电阻。
AI.result: 发现简单畴构型可展示零、整数或分数倍量子电阻的纵向和横向（霍尔）响应，为实验提供了有用的计算方法和比较目录。
AI.conclusion: 半经典分析为二维拓扑材料实验提供了有用的计算工具和比较基准，Chern mosaic中的畴壁网络可产生丰富的输运现象。

title: Annealing-induced grain coarsening and voltage kinks in superconducting NbRe films
summary: NbRe, a non-centrosymmetric superconductor with a transition temperature $T_\mathrm{c}$ up to 9\,K, attracts interest for its strong antisymmetric spin-orbit coupling and suitability for single-photon detection. While bulk and thin-film polycrystalline NbRe are well studied, how superconductivity and vortex dynamics evolve with increasing grain size in thin films is largely unknown. Here, we investigate as-grown and annealed 20\,nm-thick NbRe films, where annealing increases the average crystallite size from approximately $2$\,nm to $8$\,nm, and study vortex dynamics via current-voltage ($I$-$V$) measurements over a broad temperature and magnetic field range. In contrast to as-grown films, where the low-resistive state breaks down due to flux-flow instability, annealed films exhibit multiple voltage kinks in the $I$-$V$ curves. We attribute these kinks to the nucleation and growth of normal domains, as further suggested by time-dependent Ginzburg-Landau simulations. Overall, the annealed films form superconducting networks with vortex-channeling paths along the grain boundaries, while localized heating and voltage kinks could be harnessed for discrete-resistance switching and sensing.

AI.tldr: NbRe超导薄膜退火后晶粒尺寸增大，导致涡旋动力学从通量流不稳定转变为多电压拐点行为，形成超导网络结构
AI.motivation: 研究NbRe超导薄膜中晶粒尺寸增大对超导性和涡旋动力学的影响，探索其在单光子探测和离散电阻开关应用中的潜力
AI.method: 制备20nm厚的NbRe薄膜，通过退火处理将平均晶粒尺寸从2nm增加到8nm，在宽温度-磁场范围内进行电流-电压测量，并结合时间相关的Ginzburg-Landau模拟
AI.result: 退火薄膜在I-V曲线中表现出多个电压拐点，与未退火薄膜的通量流不稳定行为不同；这些拐点归因于正常畴的成核和生长，形成沿晶界的涡旋通道超导网络
AI.conclusion: 晶粒尺寸增大改变了NbRe薄膜的涡旋动力学行为，形成超导网络结构，局部加热和电压拐点特性可用于离散电阻开关和传感应用

title: Path-Integral Formulation of Unavoidable Canonical Nonlinearity: Dynamic Discretization Cost over Variable Supports
summary: In the statistical thermodynamics of classical discrete systems, the map from microscopic interactions to thermodynamic equilibrium configurations generally exhibits complex nonlinearity, known as "canonical nonlinearity" (CN). While conventionally characterized by the Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence, this approach inevitably misses intrinsic nonlinearities arising from the discretization of continuous Gaussian families themselves. This intrinsic effect of unavoidable CN (UCN), has recently been quantified within a transport-information-geometric framework. However, the UCN is fundamentally limited to evaluating the discretization-induced cost for a single continuous distribution. It therefore does not capture the information-geometric cost between a continuous Gaussian reference and an actual discrete distribution, nor between states with fundamentally different supports, making it conceptually unclear how to decompose the overall CN. To address this limitation, we propose the Path-Integral UCN (PUCN) quantifying the cumulative information-geometric cost between distinct distributions. The PUCN adopts a path by (i) retaining the canonical distribution as an exponential family via the $e$-mixture (geometric mean) of the base measure, leading to an arithmetic mixture of the Fisher metric as the CN standard, and (ii) enforcing covariant changes in the discretization cell through the harmonic mixture of its second-moment matrix $M$, reflecting the uncertainty in parameter variations on the statistical manifold. The resulting PUCN provides a flexible measure of the geometric cost between arbitrary states, including those with essentially different supports. This formulation enables an explicit quantification of CN between different CDOS systems and a natural decomposition of the total CN into the UCN and a residual contribution, which has not been clearly separated in existing approaches.

AI.tldr: 提出路径积分UCN（PUCN）来量化离散系统中不同分布之间的累积信息几何成本，能够分解整体规范非线性性（CN）为固有部分和残差部分。
AI.motivation: 传统使用KL散度的方法无法捕捉离散化连续高斯族本身产生的固有非线性性（UCN），且UCN仅限于评估单个连续分布的离散化成本，无法量化连续高斯参考与实际离散分布之间的信息几何成本，也无法处理具有不同支撑集的分布。
AI.method: 提出路径积分UCN（PUCN）：1）通过基测度的e-混合（几何平均）保持规范分布为指数族，导致Fisher度量的算术混合作为CN标准；2）通过其第二矩矩阵M的调和混合强制离散化单元的协变变化，反映统计流形上参数变化的不确定性。
AI.result: PUCN提供了任意状态（包括具有本质上不同支撑集的分布）之间几何成本的灵活度量，能够显式量化不同CDOS系统之间的CN，并将总CN自然分解为UCN和残差贡献。
AI.conclusion: PUCN框架解决了现有方法中无法清晰分离固有CN和残差CN的局限性，为离散系统的统计热力学提供了更全面的规范非线性性量化方法。

title: Cryogenic hydrogen embrittlement of 316plus (EN 1.4420) stainless steel at 77 K and 20 K
summary: This paper presents the first experimental characterisation of combined hydrogen-temperature effects in 316plus (EN 1.4420), a new austenitic stainless steel for liquid hydrogen (LH2) storage. Uniaxial tensile tests were conducted at room temperature (RT), 77 K and 20 K on uncharged and hydrogen-precharged specimens, complemented by fractography and EBSD-based quantification of strain-induced martensite (SIM). 316plus exhibited cryogenic strengthening at 77 K and 20 K by enhanced SIM formation. Hydrogen did not influence strength at RT or 77 K and caused a modest decrease (~10%) at 20 K, keeping 316plus at the upper bound of cryogenic strength for 316L. The presence of hydrogen resulted in significant reductions in ductility at all temperatures, being most severe at 77 and 20K (~40-50%). Hydrogen suppressed SIM at 20 K, but SIM fraction did not correlate with ductility reduction. Despite the combined effect of temperature and hydrogen, 316plus retained notable ductility (reduction in area ~30%).

AI.tldr: 316plus不锈钢在液氢储存应用中，首次实验表征了氢-温度耦合效应：低温增强强度但氢显著降低延展性，尤其在77K和20K时延展性下降40-50%，但材料仍保持约30%的断面收缩率。
AI.motivation: 研究新型奥氏体不锈钢316plus在液氢储存应用中的氢-温度耦合效应，填补该材料在极端低温环境下氢脆行为的研究空白。
AI.method: 在室温、77K和20K下对未充氢和预充氢试样进行单轴拉伸试验，结合断口分析和基于EBSD的应变诱发马氏体量化分析。
AI.result: 316plus在77K和20K下因SIM形成增强而表现出低温强化；氢在室温和77K不影响强度，在20K时仅使强度降低约10%；氢在所有温度下显著降低延展性，尤其在77K和20K时降低40-50%；氢在20K时抑制SIM形成，但SIM分数与延展性降低无相关性。
AI.conclusion: 尽管氢和温度的耦合效应导致延展性显著下降，但316plus仍保持约30%的断面收缩率，处于316L低温强度的上限，显示出在液氢储存应用中的良好潜力。

title: Pressure-stabilized dual-BCC polymorphism in a rhenium-based high-entropy alloy
summary: Accessing metastable structural states in high-entropy alloys offers a promising route to tailor material properties, yet the use of high pressure to engineer such states remains underexplored. Here, we report the pressure-driven synthesis of a unique metastable dual-BCC microstructure in a near-equimolar ReNbTiZrHf alloy. Starting from an ambient two-phase mixture of hexagonal (C14-derived) and body-centered cubic (BCC) phases, compression induces a selective, diffusionless transformation of the hexagonal constituent into a second, crystallographically distinct BCC polymorph, while the original BCC phase remains stable. Upon decompression, the pressure-induced BCC phase is kinetically trapped, yielding a dual-BCC state that is inaccessible via conventional thermal processing. The pressure-stabilized BCC polymorph is Re-enriched and inherits the exceptional stiffness of its hexagonal parent (bulk modulus ~290 GPa), creating a composite microstructure with pronounced elastic and mechanical contrast relative to the softer original BCC matrix (~180 GPa). These findings demonstrate that pressure can effectively navigate the flat free-energy landscapes of chemically complex alloys, establishing a robust pathway for polymorph engineering and metastable phase design in refractory HEAs.

AI.tldr: 通过高压在ReNbTiZrHf高熵合金中合成了一种独特的亚稳态双BCC微结构，该结构无法通过常规热处理获得。
AI.motivation: 探索利用高压在化学复杂合金中设计亚稳态结构的新途径，以调控材料性能。目前高压在调控高熵合金亚稳态结构方面尚未得到充分研究。
AI.method: 对近等摩尔比的ReNbTiZrHf合金施加高压，该合金在常压下为六方相（C14衍生）和体心立方（BCC）相的两相混合物。通过压缩诱导六方相发生无扩散相变，转变为第二种晶体学上不同的BCC多晶型，而原始BCC相保持稳定。
AI.result: 成功合成了亚稳态双BCC微结构：压力诱导的BCC相富含Re元素，继承了其六方母相的高刚度（体模量~290 GPa），而原始BCC基体较软（~180 GPa），形成了具有显著弹性和机械对比度的复合微结构。
AI.conclusion: 高压可以有效调控化学复杂合金的平坦自由能景观，为耐火高熵合金的多晶型工程和亚稳态相设计建立了可靠途径。

title: Fluctuation engineering in cavity quantum materials
summary: Coupling tailored electromagnetic fluctuations to materials provides a resource for controlling correlated quantum matter. By structuring the frequency, spatial, and modal distribution of fluctuations through a new generation of cavity quantum materials, vacuum and thermal spectra can shift phase boundaries and stabilize or suppress orders. This review organizes the field around a fluctuation-focused perspective, surveying a practical design toolbox and recent milestones, and outlining theory-experiment challenges in realistic, multimode, beyond-long-wavelength regimes. We highlight photonic observables and map opportunities for equilibrium and driven control across superconducting, magnetic, moire, and topological platforms.

AI.tldr: 这篇综述论文聚焦于通过调控电磁涨落来控制量子材料，介绍了腔量子材料如何通过设计频率、空间和模态分布来影响相变和序参量，并概述了该领域的理论实验挑战和应用前景。
AI.motivation: 将定制的电磁涨落与材料耦合为控制关联量子物质提供了新途径，通过设计腔量子材料中的涨落特性，可以调控相边界和材料序参量，这为量子材料控制开辟了新的可能性。
AI.method: 采用基于涨落的视角组织该领域，综述了实用的设计工具箱和最新进展，分析了在多模、超越长波长等实际条件下的理论实验挑战，并强调了光子可观测量。
AI.result: 建立了通过调控电磁涨落控制量子材料的框架，展示了在超导、磁性、莫尔和拓扑平台上的平衡和驱动控制机会，为腔量子材料领域提供了系统性的组织和发展路线图。
AI.conclusion: 通过结构化电磁涨落为控制量子材料提供了强大的新范式，腔量子材料平台有望在多个量子材料系统中实现相边界的调控和序参量的稳定或抑制，具有广阔的应用前景。

title: Including sample shape in micromagnetics with 3D periodic boundary conditions
summary: Periodic boundary conditions (PBCs) for computing magnetic fields in repeating magnetic structures, e.g. in micromagnetic simulations, are typically imposed using the quasi periodic macrogeometry approach, where many copies of the simulated domain are introduced. This can be computationally problematic, especially if the simulated domain is incommensurate with the desired sample shape. In this work, we present a formal proof that for sufficiently large magnetic samples, only the average magnetisation gives non-negligible shape effects. Using this insight, we develop a simple, computationally efficient modification of existing implementations which incorporates shape effects in PBC methods.

AI.tldr: 提出一种计算重复磁性结构磁场周期性边界条件的新方法，通过证明大尺寸磁性样品中只有平均磁化强度产生显著形状效应，开发出计算高效的改进方案。
AI.motivation: 传统周期性边界条件方法使用准周期宏观几何方法，需要引入大量模拟域副本，计算量大且当模拟域与目标样品形状不匹配时存在问题。
AI.method: 首先形式化证明对于足够大的磁性样品，只有平均磁化强度产生非可忽略的形状效应；基于此洞察，开发对现有实现的简单计算高效修改，将形状效应纳入周期性边界条件方法。
AI.result: 开发出能够有效处理形状效应的改进周期性边界条件方法，解决了传统方法在计算效率和形状匹配方面的问题。
AI.conclusion: 通过理论证明和算法改进，为磁性模拟中的周期性边界条件问题提供了更高效、更灵活的解决方案，特别适用于大尺寸磁性样品。

title: Nonmonotonic Evolution of the Superconducting Transition Temperature and Robust Multigap Extended s-wave + s-wave Pairing in Zn-Substituted FeSe Single Crystals
summary: We report a systematic study of superconductivity on Fe1-xZnxSe single crystals synthesized over a broad Zn doping range (x = 0-0.023). High-quality single crystals across all compositions range exhibit superconducting transitions, while the transition temperature Tc shows a pronounced nonmonotonic dependence on Zn doping concentration, indicating that the underlying mechanism govering Tc its evolution cannot be explained solely by simple impurity pair breaking alone. Magnetization and transport measurements confirm the bulk behavior of superconductivity and reveal enhanced scattering effects with Zn doping. Low-temperature specific heat is consistently described by a two-gap scenario composed of an isotropic s-wave gap and an anisotropic extended s-wave gap, whereas single-gap and alternative pairing symmetries fail to describe the data. The nearly unchanged relative weights of the two gap components suggest the weak interband scattering induced by Zn substitution, thereby preserving multiband superconductivity. These results demonstrate the robustness of multigap superconductivity in FeSe and impose stringent constraints on candidate pairing mechanisms, highlighting the role of multiband electronic structure and anisotropic gap formation.

AI.tldr: FeSe单晶中Zn掺杂对超导性的系统研究显示Tc呈非单调变化，证实了多能隙超导的鲁棒性，支持各向同性s波和各向异性扩展s波双能隙模型。
AI.motivation: 研究FeSe中Zn掺杂对超导性的影响，探索超导转变温度Tc的演化机制，验证多能隙超导模型的适用性，为理解铁基超导体的配对机制提供实验依据。
AI.method: 在宽范围Zn掺杂浓度（x=0-0.023）下合成高质量Fe1-xZnxSe单晶，通过磁化率和输运测量确认体超导行为，利用低温比热分析能隙结构。
AI.result: Tc随Zn掺杂呈显著非单调变化，不能用简单杂质对破缺解释；比热数据支持双能隙模型（各向同性s波+各向异性扩展s波），Zn替代引起的弱带间散射保持了多带超导性。
AI.conclusion: FeSe中多能隙超导具有鲁棒性，Zn掺杂揭示了多带电子结构和各向异性能隙形成的重要性，为候选配对机制提供了严格约束。

title: Self-similar Dynamics in Percolation and Sandpile
summary: Spatial self-similarity is a hallmark of critical phenomena. We study the dynamic process of percolation, in which bonds are incrementally added to an initially empty lattice until the system becomes fully occupied. By tracking the gap -- the size increment of clusters upon bond addition -- and the corresponding merged cluster, we identify scale-invariant temporal patterns in both quantities throughout a large portion of the process. This reveals a form of temporal self-similarity that has not been reported before. We further establish quantitative relations between the dynamic scaling exponents and the conventional static critical exponents, which enable the determination of critical behavior without prior knowledge of the critical point. The same self-similar dynamics is observed in both bond and site percolation on lattices and networks, and extends to other systems such as explosive and rigidity percolation. Moreover, similar temporal scaling is found in the initial nonequilibrium evolution of the Bak-Tang-Wiesenfeld sandpile model, suggesting a dynamic critical behavior distinct from its equilibrium state. These results provide a unified framework for understanding critical dynamics and may find applications in a broad range of complex systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文发现渗流过程中存在时间自相似性，通过追踪簇合并时的间隙和合并簇大小，揭示了动态临界行为，建立了动态标度指数与静态临界指数的定量关系，为理解临界动力学提供了统一框架。
AI.motivation: 研究渗流过程中的动态临界行为，探索是否存在时间自相似性，建立动态标度指数与静态临界指数的关系，为理解复杂系统的临界动力学提供新视角。
AI.method: 通过追踪渗流过程中添加键（或点）时簇的间隙（gap）和合并簇的大小，分析这些量的时间演化模式。研究包括键渗流、点渗流、爆炸渗流、刚性渗流等多种系统，并扩展到Bak-Tang-Wiesenfeld沙堆模型的非平衡演化。
AI.result: 发现了渗流过程中存在时间自相似性，建立了动态标度指数与静态临界指数的定量关系，使得无需先验知道临界点即可确定临界行为。这种自相似动态在多种渗流系统和网络中普遍存在，沙堆模型也表现出类似的时间标度行为。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了渗流过程中的时间自相似性，建立了动态临界行为的统一框架，为理解复杂系统的临界动力学提供了新工具，具有广泛的应用潜力。

title: Experimental proof of strong $Π$-$Σ$ mixing in the Renner-Teller and Pseudo-Jahn-Teller affected CCH$^+$ ($^3Π$) ion
comment: 24 pages, 5 figures. Supplementary information can be found on the journal webpage. In press in The Journal of Physical Chemistry Letters
summary: The ethynyl radical cation, CCH$^+$ ($^3Π$), offers a unique system for fundamental spectroscopic studies of non-adiabatic effects due to its open-shell linear structure and the presence of a low-lying $^3Σ^-$ state, which induces notable perturbations in the (ro-)vibrational spectrum. To probe these effects, we recorded the broadband vibrational spectrum of CCH$^+$ from 350-3450 cm$^{-1}$ using leak-out spectroscopy. The spectrum reveals a complex splitting pattern in the CCH bending mode, attributed to Renner-Teller and pseudo-Jahn-Teller coupling effects between the $^3 Π$ and $^3 Σ^-$ electronic states. A three-state diabatic model, validated here against high-resolution IR data of the CH stretching mode, facilitated assignments within the broadband infrared (IR) spectrum, including an additional $Π$ vibronic feature observed in the aforementioned high-resolution spectrum. Our results highlight a pronounced sensitivity of the splitting pattern to the $Π$-$Σ$ energy gap, with couplings so large that even the zero-point vibrational motion of the bending vibration is sufficient to disrupt the vibronic structure of this ion. This compact ion, with strong coupling effects and high-quality spectroscopic data, serves as an exemplary system for evaluating non-adiabatic models.

AI.tldr: CCH⁺光谱研究揭示其弯曲振动模式中复杂的能级分裂，源于³Π和³Σ⁻电子态间的Renner-Teller和伪Jahn-Teller耦合效应，为研究非绝热效应提供了理想模型体系。
AI.motivation: 研究CCH⁺（³Π）自由基阳离子，因其开壳层线性结构和低能³Σ⁻态的存在，为研究非绝热效应提供了独特的光谱学平台。
AI.method: 使用泄漏光谱法记录350-3450 cm⁻¹范围的宽带振动光谱，结合三态非绝热模型分析，并与高分辨率CH伸缩振动模式红外数据进行验证。
AI.result: 光谱显示CCH弯曲模式存在复杂分裂模式，源于³Π和³Σ⁻态间的Renner-Teller和伪Jahn-Teller耦合效应；分裂模式对Π-Σ能隙高度敏感，耦合强度大到足以破坏离子的振动结构。
AI.conclusion: CCH⁺作为紧凑离子体系，具有强耦合效应和高质量光谱数据，是评估非绝热模型的理想范例系统。

title: Optical spin defect pairs in cubic boron nitride
summary: Room-temperature optically active solid-state spin defects are widely known to be useful in quantum sensing applications, however, only a select range of materials have been found to host such systems. Recent measurements in the van der Waals material hexagonal boron nitride (hBN) have shown optically detected magnetic resonance (ODMR) with spin-1/2-like signatures can be explained by a charge transfer mechanism where charges move between adjacent defects forming weakly coupled spin pairs. Interestingly, these ODMR signatures have been reported in a variety of materials aside from hBN, suggesting the spin pair model provides a potentially material agnostic approach for enabling ODMR. Here, we test whether the charge transfer mechanism is supported in a different crystal phase, and report on ODMR signatures in cubic boron nitride (cBN), showing all the characteristic properties identified in hBN are preserved. We consider a selection of different cBN samples of varying size and observe ODMR from a single sub-micron cBN particle, paving the way towards sensing applications. This work further expands understanding of the ubiquity of optical spin defect pairs, and establishes the potential for exploring quantum technologies with a wider range of materials.

AI.tldr: 在立方氮化硼(cBN)中观察到与六方氮化硼(hBN)相似的ODMR信号，证实电荷转移机制在不同晶体相中普遍存在，为量子传感应用开辟新途径。
AI.motivation: 探索电荷转移机制是否在不同晶体相中普遍存在，验证自旋对模型是否具有材料无关性，扩展光学活性固态自旋缺陷的材料范围。
AI.method: 在不同尺寸的立方氮化硼(cBN)样品中进行光学检测磁共振(ODMR)测量，包括单个亚微米cBN颗粒，观察自旋-1/2特征信号。
AI.result: 在cBN中观察到与hBN完全相同的ODMR特征信号，所有特性都得以保留，表明电荷转移机制在不同晶体相中普遍适用。
AI.conclusion: 电荷转移机制在不同晶体相中普遍存在，自旋对模型具有材料无关性，为量子技术应用开辟了更广泛的材料选择范围。

title: Realistic Pearl vortices in thin film superconductors
summary: We analyze magnetic field profiles of vortices in thin-film superconductors, shedding new light on this old and presumed settled problem. In sufficiently thin films with realistic Ginzburg-Landau parameter $κ= 1/\sqrt{2}$, the magnetic screening around a vortex core is neither exponential -- as is expected in bulk -- nor the power-law that was predicted by Pearl. Instead, a universal curve for the magnetic field variation appears that scales with the sample thickness. The thickness dependence is consistent with the seminal Pearl length, and serves as an indication of the reduced magnetic field screening present in two-dimensional superconductor. Finally, we quantify the crossover from bulk-like to thin superconductors, and establish different screening length-scales relevant for the analysis of experimental data.

AI.tldr: 研究发现超薄超导薄膜中涡旋磁场的屏蔽行为既不是体材料的指数衰减，也不是Pearl预测的幂律衰减，而是一种随样品厚度变化的普适曲线。
AI.motivation: 重新研究这个被认为已经解决的问题，揭示超薄超导薄膜中涡旋磁场的实际屏蔽行为，为二维超导体中的磁场屏蔽提供新见解。
AI.method: 分析具有实际金兹堡-朗道参数κ=1/√2的超薄超导薄膜中涡旋的磁场分布，研究样品厚度对磁场屏蔽的影响。
AI.result: 发现超薄超导薄膜中涡旋核心周围的磁场屏蔽既不是体材料的指数衰减，也不是Pearl预测的幂律衰减，而是呈现随厚度变化的普适曲线，厚度依赖性与Pearl长度一致，表明二维超导体中磁场屏蔽减弱。
AI.conclusion: 建立了从体材料到超薄超导体的转变过程，确定了用于实验数据分析的不同屏蔽长度尺度，为二维超导体中的磁场屏蔽行为提供了新的理论框架。

title: Eigenstate entanglement entropy in Bose-Hubbard models
summary: While the eigenstate entanglement entropy has been extensively studied for fermionic systems, much less is known about bosonic systems. Here, we study the entanglement entropy of mid-spectrum eigenstates of Bose-Hubbard models, focusing on weakly disordered models with and without particle-number conservation, and contrasting them with the translationally-invariant model. We analyze the volume-law and O(1) contributions to the entanglement entropy via the averages over mid-spectrum eigenstates and the corresponding distributions. We derive the volume-law coefficient of the entanglement entropy by generalizing the mean-field approach from [Phys. Rev. Lett. 119, 220603 (2017)] to many-body systems with a tunable local bosonic cutoff, which agrees with previous analytical and numerical results from [Phys. Rev. B 110, 235154 (2024)]. We show that the volume-law contribution to the entanglement entropy does not change upon breaking translational invariance via on-site disorder. We then numerically study the role of the subleading O(1) contribution to the entanglement entropy. We find that, in the particle-number conserving case, it exhibits a nontrivial dependence on the particle-number density and the local bosonic cutoff, while without particle-number conservation, results suggest the emergence of a universal O(1) contribution beyond the random pure state predictions.

AI.tldr: 研究玻色-哈伯德模型中能谱中间本征态的纠缠熵，分析体积律和O(1)项贡献，发现体积律系数与平移不变性无关，而O(1)项在粒子数守恒和非守恒情况下表现出不同行为。
AI.motivation: 虽然费米子系统的本征态纠缠熵已被广泛研究，但对玻色子系统的了解较少。本文旨在研究玻色-哈伯德模型中能谱中间本征态的纠缠熵，特别关注弱无序模型（有无粒子数守恒）与平移不变模型的对比。
AI.method: 1. 通过平均能谱中间本征态及其分布分析纠缠熵的体积律和O(1)贡献；2. 将平均场方法推广到具有可调局域玻色截断的多体系统，推导纠缠熵的体积律系数；3. 数值研究O(1)项贡献，对比粒子数守恒与非守恒情况。
AI.result: 1. 推导的体积律系数与先前解析和数值结果一致；2. 纠缠熵的体积律贡献在通过在位无序破坏平移不变性时不改变；3. 在粒子数守恒情况下，O(1)项对粒子数密度和局域玻色截断有非平凡依赖；4. 无粒子数守恒时，结果暗示存在超越随机纯态预测的普适O(1)贡献。
AI.conclusion: 玻色-哈伯德模型中能谱中间本征态的纠缠熵体积律系数与平移不变性无关，而O(1)项贡献在粒子数守恒和非守恒情况下表现出不同特性，后者可能具有超越随机纯态预测的普适行为。

title: Limitations of MRSF-TDDFT for Applications in Photochemistry
summary: Mixed-reference spin-flip time-dependent density functional theory (MRSF-TDDFT) has recently emerged as an attractive electronic-structure method for studying photochemical processes, given that it bridges the computational efficiency of single-reference approaches with the versatility of multireference methods. In the following, we critically assess the general applicability of MRSF-TDDFT to photochemistry and identify two important limitations. First, the doubly-excited configurations included in MRSF-TDDFT come at the cost of missing some singly-excited configurations. Second, MRSF-TDDFT provides unreliable excited-state energies when its triplet reference - a cornerstone of the method - abruptly changes its nature, e.g., when the T$_1$ and T$_2$ triplet states become nearly degenerate and exchange electronic character. This change of character of the triplet reference can induce discontinuities or sharp distortions in electronic potential energy curves of the response states in unsuspected regions of the nuclear configuration space. We propose strategies and diagnostics to detect these limitations in the exploration of potential energy surfaces and nonadiabatic molecular dynamics using MRSF-TDDFT.

AI.tldr: MRSF-TDDFT虽然结合了单参考方法的效率和多重参考方法的灵活性，但在光化学应用中存在两个重要限制：缺失部分单激发构型和三重态参考态性质突变导致的激发态能量不可靠问题。
AI.motivation: 评估MRSF-TDDFT在光化学研究中的普适性，识别该方法在实际应用中的局限性，为光化学过程研究提供更可靠的电子结构方法指导。
AI.method: 通过理论分析和数值模拟，评估混合参考自旋翻转时间依赖密度泛函理论（MRSF-TDDFT）在光化学研究中的适用性，识别其局限性并提出相应的诊断策略。
AI.result: 发现MRSF-TDDFT存在两个关键限制：1）包含双激发构型的同时缺失了部分单激发构型；2）当三重态参考态（T1和T2）接近简并并交换电子特性时，激发态能量变得不可靠，导致势能曲线出现不连续或尖锐扭曲。
AI.conclusion: MRSF-TDDFT在光化学研究中存在重要局限性，需要开发诊断策略来检测这些限制，以确保在势能面探索和非绝热分子动力学模拟中的可靠性。

title: A transferable framework for structure-energy mapping of nanovoid-solute complexes: Tungsten alloys as a model system
summary: Understanding the structures and energetics of nanovoid-solute complexes is essential for elucidating the coupled evolution of defects in metals. Yet their vast and complex configurational space poses a major challenge to conventional approaches. Using W-Re as a representative system, we demonstrate that solute segregation at nanovoid surfaces can be decomposed into direct nanovoid-solute interactions and nanovoid-mediated solute-solute interactions. Both are governed by local coordination motifs, with identical motifs giving nearly identical energetics. Based on first-principles data, we trained machine-learning models to map diverse local motifs to their energetics, enabling the energetics of any nanovoid-solute complex to be reconstructed from a finite set of constituent local motifs. We further developed a size-dependent configurational-search framework to efficiently identify thermodynamically stable structures, using exhaustive enumeration, simulated annealing, and greedy addition for small, medium-sized, and large complexes, respectively. This framework enabled the construction of a large database, revealed the staircase-like segregation behavior of Re, and derived a simple criterion based on Re surface coverage for rapid energy prediction across a wide size range. It also links Re segregation to vacancy-mediated nanovoid evolution and provides benchmarks for existing models and empirical potentials. Extensions to Os and Ta support the generality of the local-motif concept, and the predicted segregation behavior of solutes at nanovoids agrees with a range of experimental observations. This work establishes a physically transparent, accurate, and transferable framework for studying nanovoid-solute co-evolution in metals and provides reliable energetic inputs for multiscale simulations.

AI.tldr: 该研究开发了一个基于局部配位基元的机器学习框架，用于高效预测金属中纳米孔洞-溶质复合物的结构和能量，揭示了Re的阶梯状偏聚行为。
AI.motivation: 纳米孔洞-溶质复合物的结构和能量对理解金属中缺陷的耦合演化至关重要，但其庞大复杂的构型空间对传统方法构成重大挑战。
AI.method: 使用W-Re作为代表性体系，将溶质在纳米孔洞表面的偏聚分解为直接相互作用和孔洞介导的溶质-溶质相互作用。基于第一性原理数据训练机器学习模型，将局部配位基元映射到能量，并开发了尺寸依赖的构型搜索框架（小尺寸用穷举枚举，中等尺寸用模拟退火，大尺寸用贪心添加）。
AI.result: 建立了大型数据库，揭示了Re的阶梯状偏聚行为，推导出基于Re表面覆盖度的简单判据用于快速能量预测。将Re偏聚与空位介导的纳米孔洞演化联系起来，为现有模型和经验势提供了基准。扩展到Os和Ta验证了局部基元概念的普适性，预测结果与实验观察一致。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了一个物理透明、准确且可迁移的框架，用于研究金属中纳米孔洞-溶质的协同演化，为多尺度模拟提供了可靠的能量输入。

title: Antitopological magnetic textures in an antiferromagnetically coupled bilayer with frustration
summary: The bilayer skyrmion composed of upper and lower tightly coupled skyrmions on two layers with completely compensated topological charges (called as anti-topology here), has become one feasible improvement of conventional skyrmion to realize straight motion without skyrmion Hall effect, which has aroused great interest in practical applications. The present work investigates a general model (without external magnetic field) for the frustration-induced anti-topological bilayer magnetic textures with rich morphologies, and discusses the modulations of key parameters on the energy barrier and the current-driven dynamics. It is revealed that the interlayer coupling plays a key role in preventing distortion, and thus helps to reach a faster velocity. This model can be realized in various frustrated magnetic materials with antiferromagnetically coupled bilayer, providing a helpful guidance for the material design and application of topological magnetic textures.

AI.tldr: 研究反拓扑双层磁结构，通过上下层拓扑电荷完全补偿实现无斯格明子霍尔效应的直线运动，探索其在无外磁场条件下的形态、能量势垒和电流驱动动力学。
AI.motivation: 传统斯格明子存在斯格明子霍尔效应，导致运动轨迹弯曲，限制了实际应用。反拓扑双层结构通过上下层拓扑电荷完全补偿，有望实现直线运动，具有重要的应用价值。
AI.method: 建立无外磁场的通用模型，研究受挫诱导的反拓扑双层磁结构，分析不同形态特征，探讨关键参数对能量势垒和电流驱动动力学的调制作用。
AI.result: 发现层间耦合在防止结构扭曲中起关键作用，有助于达到更快的运动速度。该模型可在多种具有反铁磁耦合双层的受挫磁性材料中实现。
AI.conclusion: 反拓扑双层磁结构为实现无斯格明子霍尔效应的直线运动提供了可行方案，为拓扑磁结构的材料设计和应用提供了有益指导。

title: Pressure-Induced Superconducting-like Transition in the $\it d$-wave Altermagnet Candidate CsV$_2$Se$_2$O
summary: Altermagnetism generates exchange-type spin splitting without net magnetization and, in its $\it d$-wave form, resembles the angular symmetry of unconventional $\it d$-wave superconductivity. Whether this correspondence bears directly on superconducting instabilities in real correlated materials remains open. Here we study the quasi-two-dimensional vanadium oxychalcogenide CsV$_2$Se$_2$O (CVSO), a square-net $\it d$-wave altermagnet candidate, through combined experimental and theoretical investigation of its lattice structure, electronic structure and transport properties. At ambient pressure, CVSO is a weakly insulating parent state with a density-wave-like anomaly near 100 K, and its bulk properties are most consistent with a G-type compensated antiferromagnetic background. Under compression, the density-wave-like feature is suppressed, the magnetoresistance evolves from predominantly negative to positive, and a superconducting-like resistive downturn emerges below about 3 K. This low-temperature anomaly is reproducible across samples and pressure media, and is suppressed by magnetic field. Room-temperature X-ray diffraction reveals no symmetry lowering, whereas does show a pronounced compressibility anomaly over the same pressure range. CVSO thus reveals a pressure-tuned phase diagram in which a reconstructed weakly insulating parent state gives way to strange-metal-like transport and superconducting-like behavior, echoing broader phenomenology associated with unconventional superconductors, including cuprates and nickelates.

AI.tldr: CsV₂Se₂O是一种d波交变磁体候选材料，在常压下呈弱绝缘态，约100K处有密度波异常。加压后密度波被抑制，磁阻从负转正，约3K出现类超导电阻下降，磁场可抑制该现象。
AI.motivation: 研究d波交变磁性与非常规d波超导性之间的对称性对应关系是否在真实关联材料中直接导致超导不稳定性，通过研究CsV₂Se₂O材料来探索这一关联。
AI.method: 结合实验和理论研究CsV₂Se₂O的晶格结构、电子结构和输运性质。实验包括常压和高压下的输运测量、磁阻分析、X射线衍射，以及磁场对低温异常的影响。
AI.result: 常压下材料呈弱绝缘态，100K附近有密度波异常，背景为G型补偿反铁磁。加压后密度波被抑制，磁阻从负转正，约3K出现可重复的类超导电阻下降，磁场可抑制该现象。X射线衍射显示无对称性降低，但存在显著压缩异常。
AI.conclusion: CsV₂Se₂O展示了压力调谐的相图，从重构的弱绝缘母态转变为奇异金属输运和类超导行为，这与铜酸盐和镍酸盐等非常规超导体的广泛现象学相呼应。

title: Steady-state phonon heat currents and differential thermal conductance across a junction of two harmonic phonon reservoirs
summary: We study phonon transport in junctions of two harmonic reservoirs coupled together by a spring. The exact steady-state heat currents and thermal conductance are calculated using nonequilibrium Green's functions. We find that the heat currents follow Fourier's law and the thermal conductance has a peak whenever the phonon spectra match. At lower temperatures, however, the thermal conductance maximum may not coincide with the spectra-matching peak due to the exclusion of higher-frequency phonons, whose spectra may match, from participating in the transport. Furthermore, we find that increasing the coupling spring constant increases the thermal conductance. Lastly, the magnitude of the steady-state heat currents and thermal conductance are the same whether the direction of phonon flow is from left to right or vice versa, even with mass and spring constant asymmetry. The properties of this basic model can serve as a reference for more complicated setups of phonon transport in molecular junctions.

AI.tldr: 研究两个谐振库通过弹簧耦合的声子输运，发现热流遵循傅里叶定律，声子谱匹配时热导率出现峰值，但低温下峰值可能偏移。耦合弹簧常数增加会提高热导率，且热流和热导率具有左右对称性。
AI.motivation: 研究分子结中声子输运的基本模型，为更复杂的声子输运设置提供参考基准。通过分析两个谐振库通过弹簧耦合的简化系统，探索声子输运的基本特性。
AI.method: 使用非平衡格林函数方法精确计算稳态热流和热导率。研究两个谐振库通过弹簧耦合的系统，分析声子谱匹配、温度效应和耦合强度对热输运的影响。
AI.result: 热流遵循傅里叶定律；声子谱匹配时热导率出现峰值；低温下热导率最大值可能不与谱匹配峰值重合；增加耦合弹簧常数会提高热导率；即使存在质量和弹簧常数不对称，热流和热导率仍具有左右对称性。
AI.conclusion: 该基本模型揭示了声子输运的关键特性：谱匹配对热导率的重要性、温度对输运模式的影响、耦合强度对热导的增强作用，以及系统对称性。这些结果为更复杂的分子结声子输运研究提供了重要参考基准。

title: Integral-equation analysis of transient diffusion-limited currents at disk electrodes: Asymptotic expansion and compact approximation
summary: The transient diffusion-limited current at a disk electrode following a change in interfacial ion concentration induced by a potential step is analyzed with direct relevance to chronoamperometric measurements. The mixed-boundary diffusion problem is formulated in the Laplace domain and reduced to a Fredholm integral equation that directly determines the Faradaic current. The steady-state limit recovers Saito's equation, while a systematic long-time asymptotic expansion quantifies the approach to steady state. A Padé approximant yields a compact analytical expression in the time domain that accurately describes the current over experimentally relevant time ranges. In contrast to existing high-accuracy numerical procedures based on hybrid asymptotic and polynomial approximations, the present formulation provides an explicit and compact analytical representation that facilitates interpretation and practical implementation. The short-time response exhibits Cottrell's equation with edge effects characteristic of disk electrodes. Overall, the framework provides practical tools for analyzing transient currents, extracting diffusion parameters, and assessing the accuracy of widely used analytical approximations in disk-electrode chronoamperometry.

AI.tldr: 该论文分析了盘电极在电位阶跃后界面离子浓度变化引起的瞬态扩散限制电流，提出了一个紧凑的解析表达式，可用于盘电极计时电流法的实验数据分析。
AI.motivation: 现有盘电极计时电流法分析主要依赖高精度数值方法或近似公式，缺乏既准确又便于解释和实际应用的紧凑解析表达式，这限制了实验数据的分析和扩散参数的提取。
AI.method: 在拉普拉斯域中建立混合边界扩散问题，简化为Fredholm积分方程直接确定法拉第电流。通过Padé逼近获得时间域的紧凑解析表达式，并分析短时和长时渐近行为。
AI.result: 得到了一个紧凑的解析表达式，能准确描述实验相关时间范围内的电流响应。短时响应符合Cottrell方程并包含盘电极边缘效应，长时渐近展开量化了达到稳态的过程，稳态极限恢复Saito方程。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为分析瞬态电流、提取扩散参数以及评估盘电极计时电流法中广泛使用的分析近似的准确性提供了实用工具，相比现有数值方法提供了更便于解释和实际应用的解析表示。

title: Activation of Inner-Shell 4p-Orbital Electrons of Rubidium Driven by Asymmetric Coordination at High Pressure
summary: While the high oxidation states in heavy alkali fluorides (Cs, Ba, Ra) have been attributed to a pressure-driven upshift of energy level of inner p states, this route is largely ineffective for Rb because its smaller ionic radius suppresses the required level rise even under strong compression. Here, we predict a high-pressure layered ternary phase, RbBF5, in which 12-fold truncated-cube-like F coordination around Rb breaks local symmetry and activates the Rb 4p inner shell. The resulting orbital splitting selectively elevates the in-plane Rb 4px,y levels toward the F 2p manifold, enabling inner-shell participation and stabilizing Rb-F bonding under compression. More broadly, this symmetry-lowering coordination motif may provide a general mechanism for activating inner-shell p states in other alkali metals (e.g., K and Cs inner p states). These findings extend inner-shell chemistry to lighter main-group elements and establish a design principle for accessing unconventional bonding and oxidation states at high pressure.

AI.tldr: 通过高压下RbBF5相中的12配位对称性破缺激活Rb 4p内层电子，实现轻碱金属的内层化学
AI.motivation: 传统压力驱动内层p态能级上移的机制对Rb无效，因为其较小的离子半径抑制了所需能级上升。需要寻找新机制来激活轻碱金属的内层电子参与成键。
AI.method: 预测高压层状三元相RbBF5，其中Rb周围的12配位截角立方体状F配位破坏局部对称性，激活Rb 4p内层电子。轨道分裂选择性地提升面内Rb 4px,y能级，使其接近F 2p能带。
AI.result: 成功实现了Rb内层4p电子的激活和参与成键，稳定了高压下的Rb-F键。该对称性降低的配位模式为激活其他碱金属（如K和Cs）的内层p态提供了通用机制。
AI.conclusion: 将内层化学扩展到更轻的主族元素，建立了在高压下获得非常规成键和氧化态的设计原则，为探索新的化学键合模式提供了途径。

title: Reciprocity of Charge-Orbital-Spin Transport in Normal-Metal/Ferromagnet Heterostructures
summary: Orbital angular momentum has recently emerged as an important carrier of angular momentum in solids, offering new pathways for spin orbitronic functionality beyond conventional spin transport. Here, we investigate the orbital Hall effect which generates orbital torques and their reciprocal process viz orbital pumping and the inverse orbital Hall effect (iOHE) in non-magnet/ferromagnet heterostructures. Using two port scattering parameter measurements on Ru/Ni, Ru/Pt/CoFeB and Co/Cu/SiO2 devices, we directly probe both orbital torque driven magnetization dynamics and orbital pumping within the same device platform. We observe that the transmission coefficients satisfy the symmetry relations required by Onsager reciprocity, demonstrating reciprocal conversion between charge, orbital and spin angular momenta. Our results establish orbital pumping as the reciprocal counterpart of orbital torque. Our experimental findings provide a unified framework for orbital transport phenomena.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过实验验证了轨道霍尔效应与轨道泵浦之间的互易关系，建立了轨道输运的统一框架。
AI.motivation: 轨道角动量作为固体中重要的角动量载体，为自旋轨道电子学提供了超越传统自旋输运的新途径。研究旨在探索轨道霍尔效应及其互易过程（轨道泵浦和逆轨道霍尔效应）。
AI.method: 使用双端口散射参数测量技术，在Ru/Ni、Ru/Pt/CoFeB和Co/Cu/SiO2异质结器件中直接探测轨道力矩驱动的磁化动力学和轨道泵浦效应。
AI.result: 观察到传输系数满足Onsager互易性要求的对称关系，证明了电荷、轨道和自旋角动量之间的互易转换。实验确认了轨道泵浦是轨道力矩的互易对应过程。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果建立了轨道输运现象的统一框架，为轨道角动量在自旋轨道电子学中的应用提供了理论基础。

title: Superconducting orbital diode effect in SN bilayers
summary: We study the superconducting diode effect (SDE) in a diffusive superconductor - normal metal (SN) bilayer subjected to an in-plane magnetic field. The supercurrent flows along the layers, perpendicular to the field. The SDE, manifested as an asymmetry in the critical (depairing) currents and kinetic inductance for opposite current directions, arises from an orbital mechanism due to the inhomogeneous distribution of the Meissner currents caused by a spatially varying superfluid density. Recently, Levichev et al. [Phys. Rev. B 108, 094517 (2023)] demonstrated the realization of this effect in such a structure, supporting numerical calculations for an ideal interface with an experiment. In this work, we investigate the influence of a nonideal interface with finite resistance on the SDE. Employing an analytical approach, we focus on limiting cases corresponding to weak intralayer inhomogeneities. We find that the strength of the SDE depends nonmonotonically on the interface resistance when the bilayer thickness is small compared to the coherence length. Remarkably, a nonideal interface can enhance the SDE compared to the ideal case.

AI.tldr: 研究非理想界面电阻对超导二极管效应的影响，发现界面电阻与SDE强度呈非单调关系，非理想界面可能增强SDE
AI.motivation: 研究超导-正常金属双层结构中非理想界面（有限电阻）对超导二极管效应的影响，此前研究仅考虑了理想界面情况
AI.method: 采用解析方法研究弱层内不均匀性的极限情况，分析非理想界面电阻对超导二极管效应的影响
AI.result: 当双层厚度小于相干长度时，SDE强度与界面电阻呈非单调关系；非理想界面可能比理想界面产生更强的SDE
AI.conclusion: 界面电阻对超导二极管效应有重要影响，非理想界面可能增强该效应，这为优化超导二极管性能提供了新思路

title: Complex paths for real stochastic processes
summary: The calculation of the decay rate of a metastable state in the path-integral formulation of stochastic processes is revisited. Previous derivations of this rate were achieved at the cost of a step that is difficult to justify mathematically. We show that this difficulty can be resolved by working with an extremal solution that arises naturally in the Ito formulation of the path integral. To make the analysis as transparent as possible, we choose a simple potential for which the extremal solution can be written in terms of elementary functions. The mechanism identified here, however, is not restricted to this example and holds more generally.

AI.tldr: 重新审视随机过程路径积分中亚稳态衰变速率的计算，解决了先前推导中数学上难以证明的步骤，通过伊藤公式中的极值解来克服困难。
AI.motivation: 先前在随机过程路径积分框架下计算亚稳态衰变速率的推导存在一个数学上难以证明的步骤，需要解决这一理论困难。
AI.method: 采用伊藤公式中的极值解方法，并选择了一个简单的势能函数作为示例，使得极值解可以用初等函数表示，从而清晰地展示分析过程。
AI.result: 成功解决了先前推导中的数学困难，证明了通过伊藤公式中的极值解可以更严谨地计算亚稳态衰变速率。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的机制不仅适用于所选的简单示例，而且具有更广泛的适用性，为随机过程路径积分中亚稳态衰变速率的计算提供了更严谨的理论基础。

title: Transferable FB-GNN-MBE Framework for Potential Energy Surfaces: Data-Adaptive Transfer Learning in Deep Learned Many-Body Expansion Theory
comment: Under review with The Journal of Chemical Physics. Main text: 23 pages, 11 figures, and 1 table. Supplementary Materials: 28 pages, 6 figures, 15 tables, 4 pseudo-algorithms
summary: Mechanistic understanding and rational design of complex chemical systems depend on fast and accurate predictions of electronic structures beyond individual building blocks. However, if the system exceeds hundreds of atoms, first-principles quantum mechanical (QM) modeling becomes impractical. In this study, we developed FB-GNN-MBE by integrating a fragment-based graph neural network (FB-GNN) into the many-body expansion (MBE) theory and demonstrated its capacity to reproduce first-principles potential energy surfaces (PES) for hierarchically structured systems with manageable accuracy, complexity, and interpretability. Specifically, we divided the entire system into basic building blocks (fragments), evaluated their one-fragment energies using a QM model, and addressed many-fragment interactions using the structure-property relationships trained by FB-GNNs. Our investigation shows that FB-GNN-MBE achieves chemical accuracy in predicting two-body (2B) and three-body (3B) energies across water, phenol, and mixture benchmarks, as well as the one-dimensional dissociation curves of water and phenol dimers. To transfer the success of FB-GNN-MBE across various systems with minimal computational costs and data demands, we developed and validated a teacher-student learning protocol. A heavy-weight FB-GNN trained on a mixed-density water cluster ensemble (teacher) distills its learned knowledge and passes it to a light-weight GNN (student), which is later fine-tuned on a uniform-density (H2O)21 cluster ensemble. This transfer learning strategy resulted in efficient and accurate prediction of 2B and 3B energies for variously sized water clusters without retraining. Our transferable FB-GNN-MBE framework outperformed conventional non-FB-GNN-based models and showed high practicality for large-scale molecular simulations.

AI.tldr: 开发了FB-GNN-MBE方法，结合片段图神经网络和多体展开理论，用于大规模化学系统的精确电子结构预测，并通过师生学习实现跨系统知识迁移。
AI.motivation: 对于超过数百个原子的复杂化学系统，第一性原理量子力学建模变得不切实际，需要开发既能保持精度又具有可管理复杂性和可解释性的替代方法。
AI.method: 将整个系统划分为基本构建块（片段），使用QM模型评估单片段能量，通过FB-GNN训练的结构-性质关系处理多片段相互作用，并开发师生学习协议实现知识迁移。
AI.result: FB-GNN-MBE在水、苯酚及其混合物的二体和三体能量预测中达到化学精度，师生学习策略实现了不同尺寸水团簇的2B和3B能量高效准确预测，无需重新训练。
AI.conclusion: FB-GNN-MBE框架超越了传统非FB-GNN模型，在大规模分子模拟中表现出高实用性和可转移性，为复杂化学系统的机理理解和理性设计提供了有效工具。

title: Higher-order topological insulators in two-dimensional antiferromagnetic and altermagnetic chromium-based group-IV chalcogenides
summary: Based on first-principles calculations combined with theoretical analysis, we identify a family of monolayer chromium-based group-IV chalcogenides as a new class of two-dimensional (2D) magnetic higher-order topological insulators (HOTIs). Specifically, the CrC$X_3$ ($X=$ S, Se, Te) and CrSiS$_3$ monolayers are found to host conventional antiferromagnetic ground states with $\mathcal{PT}$ symmetry, whereas the Janus compounds Cr$_2$C$_2$S$_3$Se$_3$ and Cr$_2$Si$_2$S$_3$Se$_3$ exhibit altermagnetic ground states. We demonstrate that all these monolayer magnetic materials realize 2D HOTI phases, in which the nontrivial topology is protected by lattice $C_3$ rotational symmetry and manifests as zero-dimensional corner states carrying quantized fractional charges. Moreover, upon inclusion of spin-orbit coupling, these systems remain in the HOTI phase and continue to host robust corner-localized states, confirming the stability of their higher-order topological nature. Our results reveal an intrinsic connection between higher-order topology and magnetic order in 2D antiferromagnetic and altermagnetic systems, identifying chromium-based group-IV chalcogenide monolayers as promising platforms for exploring higher-order topological phases and their potential relevance for future topological and spintronic applications.

AI.tldr: 通过第一性原理计算，发现铬基IV族硫属化合物单层是一类新型二维磁性高阶拓扑绝缘体，具有受C3对称性保护的零维角态和分数电荷。
AI.motivation: 探索二维磁性系统中高阶拓扑与磁序之间的内在联系，寻找能够实现高阶拓扑相的平台材料，为未来拓扑和自旋电子学应用提供候选体系。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理计算结合理论分析，研究铬基IV族硫属化合物单层（CrCX3、CrSiS3等）及其Janus化合物（Cr2C2S3Se3、Cr2Si2S3Se3）的磁性基态和拓扑性质。
AI.result: 发现这些单层材料均实现二维高阶拓扑绝缘体相：CrCX3和CrSiS3具有传统反铁磁基态，Janus化合物呈现交变磁基态；所有体系均受C3旋转对称性保护，表现出携带分数电荷的零维角态；自旋轨道耦合下仍保持高阶拓扑绝缘体相。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了二维反铁磁和交变磁系统中高阶拓扑与磁序的内在联系，确认铬基IV族硫属化合物单层是探索高阶拓扑相及其在拓扑和自旋电子学中应用的理想平台。

title: Giant resonant nonlinear THz valley Hall effect in 2D Dirac semiconductors
summary: We predict a giant cyclotron resonance in the nonlinear valley Hall response of inversion-asymmetric two-dimensional semiconductors subjected to crossed terahertz electric and static magnetic fields. By employing a two-band Hamiltonian that incorporates both linear and quadratic in momentum terms, thereby capturing the essential orbital texture and broken inversion symmetry, we develop a kinetic theory that accounts for antisymmetric skew scattering from impurities. Solving the Boltzmann transport equation we uncover resonant photocurrents that exhibit a sharp, polarity-switching cyclotron peak and a nontrivial polarization response dictated by the underlying D3h crystal symmetry. Our results establish a universal mechanism for frequency-selective, phase-sensitive valley current control, directly accessible in monolayer transition metal dichalcogenides. This work provides a pathway for harnessing resonant nonlinear transport in valleytronic and terahertz optoelectronic devices.

AI.tldr: 预测二维半导体在太赫兹电场和静磁场交叉作用下，非线性谷霍尔响应中会出现巨大的回旋共振效应
AI.motivation: 探索在反演不对称二维半导体中，通过非线性谷霍尔效应实现频率选择性、相位敏感的谷电流控制机制，为谷电子学和太赫兹光电器件提供新途径
AI.method: 采用包含线性和二次动量项的双带哈密顿量描述轨道织构和反演对称性破缺，建立考虑杂质反称斜散射的动力学理论，求解玻尔兹曼输运方程
AI.result: 发现了具有尖锐极性切换回旋峰值的共振光电流，其偏振响应由底层D3h晶体对称性决定，在单层过渡金属硫族化合物中可直接观测
AI.conclusion: 建立了频率选择性、相位敏感谷电流控制的普适机制，为利用共振非线性输运开发谷电子学和太赫兹光电器件提供了途径

title: High-temperature superconductivity in Nd$_{0.85}$Sr$_{0.15}$NiO$_2$ membranes under pressure
summary: Lattice compression has emerged as a fundamental tuning parameter for nickelate superconductivity. Pressure acts as a trigger to induce superconductivity in bulk Ruddlesden-Popper nickelates. For infinite-layer nickelate thin films, compressive epitaxial strain and rare-earth ion chemical pressure have been used to substantially enhance the superconducting transition temperature ($T_c$). Efforts to go further have been constrained by the limits of epitaxial stability or the challenges of measuring thin films in high-pressure environments. Here, we overcome this limitation by developing a technique to incorporate freestanding infinite-layer $\mathrm{Nd_{0.85}Sr_{0.15}NiO_2}$ membranes into a diamond anvil cell. Using this platform, we observe a strong increase in $T_c$ up to our highest measurement pressure of $\sim$90 GPa, where a superconducting downturn can be observed near liquid nitrogen temperatures. Strikingly, we find a simple linear enhancement of $T_c$ at a rate of 0.65 K GPa$^{-1}$, with no signs of saturation. This suggests that the pairing strength in infinite-layer nickelates can be raised to a surprisingly high scale, using an approach that can be broadly applied to many two-dimensional materials.

AI.tldr: 通过将自支撑无限层镍酸盐薄膜集成到金刚石对顶砧中，研究人员在高达90 GPa的压力下观察到Tc线性增加至近液氮温度，揭示了镍酸盐超导配对强度可提升至惊人尺度。
AI.motivation: 晶格压缩已成为镍酸盐超导性的关键调控参数，但传统方法（外延应变、化学压力）存在稳定性限制或高压测量困难，需要开发新方法来突破这些限制。
AI.method: 开发了一种将自支撑无限层Nd₀.₈₅Sr₀.₁₅NiO₂薄膜集成到金刚石对顶砧中的技术，在高达~90 GPa的压力下测量其超导转变温度。
AI.result: 观察到Tc随压力线性增加，速率达0.65 K GPa⁻¹，最高压力下超导转变接近液氮温度，且无饱和迹象。
AI.conclusion: 无限层镍酸盐的配对强度可提升至惊人尺度，该方法可广泛应用于其他二维材料的高压研究。

title: Unifying hydrodynamic theory for motility-regulated active matter: from single particles to interacting polymers
summary: Understanding how microscopic motility shapes emergent collective behaviors is a challenging task in active matter, especially when self-propulsion is regulated by external cues or via quorum-sensing interactions. To address this problem, we derive a closed hydrodynamics for scalar active matter with spatially-regulated motility, under general hypotheses for the microscopic dynamics of the particles' orientations. We show that, at large scales, the contribution of the latter is entirely captured by the autocorrelation tensor of the orientations. This allows us to establish a macroscopic equivalence within a broad class of motility-regulated active systems, from single particles to active polymers. Our formalism allows us to reveal a new form of motility-induced phase separation for quorum-sensing active polymers, which we term anti-MIPS, where dense phases exhibit enhanced activity relative to dilute regions. Our theory shows that anti-MIPS generically arises for motility-regulated agents with internal structure, uncovering the existence of several distinct transition pathways.

AI.tldr: 该论文推导了具有空间调控运动能力的标量活性物质的封闭流体动力学方程，建立了微观运动与宏观集体行为之间的联系，揭示了活性聚合物中一种新型的"反MIPS"相分离现象。
AI.motivation: 理解微观运动如何塑造宏观集体行为是活性物质研究中的挑战，特别是在自推进受外部信号或群体感应调控的情况下。需要建立连接微观动力学与宏观现象的通用理论框架。
AI.method: 推导了具有空间调控运动能力的标量活性物质的封闭流体动力学方程，在粒子取向微观动力学的广义假设下，证明在大尺度上取向的贡献完全由其自相关张量捕获。建立了从单粒子到活性聚合物的广泛类别运动调控活性系统的宏观等价性。
AI.result: 理论揭示了群体感应活性聚合物中一种新型的"反MIPS"相分离现象，其中致密相区域比稀薄区域表现出更强的活性。该理论表明反MIPS普遍存在于具有内部结构的运动调控活性剂中，并揭示了多种不同的相变路径。
AI.conclusion: 该研究建立了连接微观运动调控与宏观集体行为的通用理论框架，揭示了活性聚合物中新型的反MIPS相分离现象，为理解具有内部结构的活性系统的相行为提供了新视角。

title: Linking Calendar and Cycle Ageing in Lithium-Ion Batteries through Consistent Parameterisation of an Electrochemical-Thermal-Degradation Model
summary: Parameterisation of coupled degradation mechanisms in lithium-ion batteries is a major challenge. Interactions between the mechanisms depend on usage conditions: C-rate, rest state-of-charge (SoC), depth-of-discharge (DoD) and temperature. This work presents a framework to consistently parameterise key degradation modes--solid-electrolyte interphase (SEI) growth, lithium plating, and active material loss in both electrodes--using insights derived from degradation mode analysis data. The work predicts capacity fade trajectories of a NMC-based lithium-ion cell under both calendar and combined calendar-cyclic ageing, using a P2D electrochemical-thermal-degradation model. The work predicts state-of-health (SoH), remaining-useful-life (RUL) and internal degradation modes of the cell--under 81 combinations of temperature (10$^o$C, 25$^o$C, 40$^o$C), C-rate (0.1 C, 0.3 C and 1.0 C), rest SoC (10%, 60%, and 100%) and DoD (50%, 70%, and 90%)--using PyBaMM. The predicted cycle-life varies between 0.8 to 14 years to reach 75% of SoH. The work provides mechanistic insights into competing effects between calendar and cyclic ageing, during cycling. The model demonstrates sub-linear, linear, and sup-linear/accelerated capacity fade based on the usage conditions. The simulated dataset for all the cases is made available.

AI.tldr: 提出一个参数化锂离子电池耦合降解机制的框架，使用P2D电化学-热-降解模型预测NMC电池在日历老化和循环老化下的容量衰减轨迹，分析温度、C率、静置SOC和DOD对寿命的影响。
AI.motivation: 锂离子电池中耦合降解机制的参数化是一个主要挑战，不同降解机制之间的相互作用取决于使用条件（C率、静置SOC、DOD和温度），需要建立一致的参数化框架来准确预测电池寿命。
AI.method: 基于降解模式分析数据，建立参数化关键降解模式（SEI生长、锂沉积、正负极活性材料损失）的框架，使用P2D电化学-热-降解模型，通过PyBaMM模拟81种不同使用条件组合下的电池老化行为。
AI.result: 预测NMC电池在75%健康状态下的循环寿命在0.8到14年之间变化，揭示了日历老化和循环老化之间的竞争效应，模型展示了基于使用条件的亚线性、线性和超线性/加速容量衰减模式，并提供了所有模拟数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提供了一个系统框架来参数化锂离子电池的耦合降解机制，能够准确预测不同使用条件下的电池寿命，为电池管理系统和寿命预测提供了重要工具和洞察。

title: Grain Growth Kinetics in (Cr,Mo,Ta,V,W)C1-δ High-Entropy Carbide Ceramics
summary: Understanding grain-boundary mobility during spark plasma sintering can enable microstructure control in high-entropy carbides, yet quantitative grain-growth kinetics remain scarce. In this work, grain growth kinetics and densification behavior were investigated for single-phase fully dense (Cr,Mo,Ta,V,W)C1-δ high-entropy carbide ceramics. Specimens were densified by spark plasma sintering for a constant dwell time of 10 min at temperatures between 1750 °C and 1950 °C to isolate the role of temperature on microstructural evolution. Increasing sintering temperature produced grain growth and increased lattice parameter, while maintaining a single-phase rock salt structure. Elemental mapping showed a progressive reduction of Ta segregation with increasing sintering temperature, suggesting enhanced chemical homogenization at elevated temperatures. Grain growth kinetics were analyzed using a normal grain growth model with an assumed growth exponent of n=3, physically reasonable for grain-boundary-controlled growth influenced by solute and vacancy pinning. Arrhenius analysis of the growth factor yielded an apparent activation energy of approximately 620 kJ mol-1, comparable to diffusion-controlled processes in refractory transition-metal carbides. Densification curves revealed rapid consolidation prior to reaching the peak temperature followed by temperature-dominated grain coarsening. These results establish quantitative relationships between densification temperature, grain growth, and diffusion kinetics in a carbide system, providing insight into the microstructural stability of high-entropy, ultra-high-temperature carbide ceramics.

AI.tldr: 研究通过火花等离子烧结探究高熵碳化物(Cr,Mo,Ta,V,W)C1-δ的晶粒生长动力学与致密化行为，建立了温度与晶粒生长、扩散动力学之间的定量关系。
AI.motivation: 理解火花等离子烧结过程中的晶界迁移率可以实现高熵碳化物的微观结构控制，但目前缺乏定量的晶粒生长动力学数据。
AI.method: 采用火花等离子烧结在1750-1950°C温度范围内对单相致密高熵碳化物进行10分钟恒温烧结，分析温度对微观结构演变的影响。使用正常晶粒生长模型(n=3)分析晶粒生长动力学，并通过Arrhenius分析计算表观活化能。
AI.result: 随着烧结温度升高，晶粒生长和晶格参数增加，但保持单相岩盐结构。Ta偏析随温度升高逐渐减少，表明高温下化学均匀性增强。晶粒生长因子Arrhenius分析得到约620 kJ mol-1的表观活化能，与难熔过渡金属碳化物中的扩散控制过程相当。致密化曲线显示在达到峰值温度前快速致密化，随后是温度主导的晶粒粗化。
AI.conclusion: 该研究建立了碳化物系统中致密化温度、晶粒生长和扩散动力学之间的定量关系，为高熵、超高温碳化物陶瓷的微观结构稳定性提供了重要见解。

title: Topology-constrained spin-wave modes of asymmetric antibimerons and their clusters
summary: Collective modes are a defining signature of coupled degrees of freedom, forming a bridge between understanding of interactions in condensed-matter systems and emergent functionality. Topological magnetic textures provide a natural platform to realize and control such collective modes at the nanoscale. Here we theoretically identify and characterize low-energy collective spin-wave excitations of isolated asymmetric antibimerons and their clusters in ultrathin ferromagnetic films. We demonstrate that an isolated asymmetric antibimeron supports a discrete spectrum of localized modes, reflecting its internal degrees of freedom. When multiple asymmetric antibimerons form a cluster, inter-texture coupling leads to the splitting of these modes into $N$-fold multiplets, where $N$ denotes the number of asymmetric antibimerons. To rationalize these findings, we introduce an effective coupled-oscillator model based on meron pairs that captures the essential collective dynamics of the system. This emergent classical mechanics description reveals that the motion of asymmetric antibimeron clusters can be understood in terms of well-defined normal modes governed by topology-constrained particle-like degrees of freedom. These results establish coupled asymmetric antibimerons as a tunable platform for spin-wave based nano-oscillators, whose normal-mode spectrum is controllable through cluster size, thus providing a programmable set of low-lying resonances for these nano-oscillators.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了超薄铁磁薄膜中不对称反双半子及其团簇的低能集体自旋波激发，发现这些拓扑磁结构支持离散的局域模式，团簇中模式会分裂成N重多重态，可用耦合振子模型描述，为自旋波纳米振荡器提供了可编程平台。
AI.motivation: 集体模式是耦合自由度的重要特征，连接着凝聚态系统中相互作用的理解和涌现功能。拓扑磁结构为实现和控制纳米尺度集体模式提供了天然平台，但不对称反双半子及其团簇的集体动力学尚未被充分研究。
AI.method: 理论识别和表征超薄铁磁薄膜中孤立不对称反双半子及其团簇的低能集体自旋波激发。引入基于半子对的等效耦合振子模型来描述系统的集体动力学，建立拓扑约束的粒子自由度描述。
AI.result: 孤立不对称反双半子支持反映其内部自由度的离散局域模式谱。当多个不对称反双半子形成团簇时，模式分裂成N重多重态。耦合振子模型成功捕捉了系统的集体动力学，表明运动可通过拓扑约束的粒子自由度理解。
AI.conclusion: 耦合的不对称反双半子构成了可调谐的自旋波纳米振荡器平台，其正常模式谱可通过团簇尺寸控制，为这些纳米振荡器提供了一套可编程的低能共振。

title: Multiscale perturbative approach to active matter with motility regulation
summary: We present a coarse-graining method applicable to dry scalar active matter with motility regulation. Our approach, based on a multiscale perturbative expansion of the backward Kolmogorov equation, does not rely on any specific microscopic dynamics for the particles' orientations. Its generality allows us to address different forms of motility regulation, from space-dependent self-propulsion speed to taxis, and to extend the analysis to a class of non-Markovian orientational dynamics. Furthermore, we identify general conditions on the microscopic dynamics that ensure the existence of an effective large-scale equilibrium regime. When the latter are violated, our theoretical framework is able to quantitatively capture the emergence of large-scale particle currents. We directly apply our coarse-grained theory to several models of self-propelled agents, ranging from single particles to active polymers, and test our analytical predictions with numerical simulations. Finally, we show that our theory naturally extends to active matter with density-mediated interactions, such as quorum sensing, with potential applications to self-organizing soft materials.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种适用于干性标量活性物质的粗粒化方法，基于多尺度扰动展开，能够处理多种运动调节形式，识别有效大尺度平衡条件，并扩展到非马尔可夫取向动力学。
AI.motivation: 开发一种通用的粗粒化方法，能够处理干性标量活性物质中的不同运动调节形式，包括空间依赖的自推进速度、趋化性等，并扩展到非马尔可夫取向动力学，同时识别大尺度平衡条件。
AI.method: 基于后向Kolmogorov方程的多尺度扰动展开方法，不依赖于特定的微观取向动力学，适用于多种运动调节形式，可扩展到非马尔可夫取向动力学。
AI.result: 该方法能够定量捕捉大尺度粒子流的出现，识别微观动力学中确保有效大尺度平衡条件的一般条件，并成功应用于从单粒子到活性聚合物等多种自推进剂模型，数值模拟验证了理论预测。
AI.conclusion: 该理论框架具有通用性，能够处理多种运动调节形式，自然扩展到具有密度介导相互作用的活性物质（如群体感应），在自组织软材料中具有潜在应用价值。

title: Selective Random Structure Search (SRSS): Unbiased Exploration of Polymorphs in Crystals
summary: Crystal structure prediction has traditionally relied on prototype-based seeding, approaches that often bias sampling toward known low-energy basins and overlook metastable polymorphs with unconventional symmetries. Here, we introduce Selective Random Structure Search (SRSS), a high-throughput, unbiased framework designed to explore the configurational space of crystalline materials across all dimensions. SRSS combines symmetry-constrained random generation with feature-based diversity selection and rapid relaxation and stability evaluation via universal machine-learning interatomic potentials (uMLIPs). Applied to diverse systems, including bulk system SiC and BaPtAs, 2D layered compounds NbSe2, and 1D nanotubes GaN, SRSS successfully recovers known ground states while revealing numerous previously unreported, dynamically stable polymorphs. Notable discoveries include complex cage-like SiC polytypes, low-energy BaPtAs polymorphs beyond experimental records, a semiconducting orthorhombic phase of 2D-NbSe2, and distinct armchair/zigzag GaN nanotubes. Crucially, the entire workflow operates efficiently on standard CPU resources without GPU acceleration, demonstrating that rigorous, hypothesis-free polymorph discovery is accessible even in resource-limited settings. SRSS thus establishes a robust, scalable platform for mapping the full landscape of crystal stability, bridging the gap between exhaustive search and computational feasibility.

AI.tldr: SRSS是一种无偏的高通量晶体结构预测框架，通过对称约束随机生成、特征多样性选择和机器学习势函数快速评估，能在标准CPU资源上发现已知基态和新的亚稳相。
AI.motivation: 传统晶体结构预测方法依赖原型种子，偏向已知低能区域，容易忽略非常规对称性的亚稳多晶型。需要一种无偏的方法来全面探索晶体材料的构型空间。
AI.method: SRSS结合对称约束随机生成、基于特征的多样性选择，以及通过通用机器学习原子间势（uMLIPs）进行快速松弛和稳定性评估。整个流程在标准CPU资源上运行，无需GPU加速。
AI.result: 成功应用于多种体系（体相SiC和BaPtAs、二维层状NbSe2、一维纳米管GaN），不仅恢复了已知基态，还发现了许多先前未报道的动态稳定多晶型，包括复杂的笼状SiC多型、超出实验记录的低能BaPtAs相、二维NbSe2的半导体正交相以及不同的扶手椅/锯齿形GaN纳米管。
AI.conclusion: SRSS建立了一个稳健、可扩展的平台，用于映射完整的晶体稳定性景观，在穷尽搜索和计算可行性之间架起了桥梁，证明即使在资源有限的环境中也能进行严格的、无假设的多晶型发现。

title: Experimental Verification of a Universal Operator Growth Hypothesis
summary: F$^{19}$ nuclear magnetic resonance free induction decay (FID) data are used to verify the predictions of a universal growth hypothesis for the Lanczos coefficients proposed by Parker et al. Our results strongly support this hypothesis and permit to calculate values of the growth parameter $α$ for three crystal orientations. For the magnetic field parallel the [100] crystal axis, we found $α=3.161 \times 10^{4} sec^{-1}$. The special experimental conditions required for the observability of a singularity in the analytic continuation of the FID, which from the experimental data was found to be of branch-point type, are discussed.

AI.tldr: 使用F19核磁共振自由感应衰减数据验证Lanczos系数通用增长假说，支持该假说并计算了三个晶体取向的生长参数α值
AI.motivation: 验证Parker等人提出的Lanczos系数通用增长假说，该假说预测了核磁共振自由感应衰减中的特定数学行为
AI.method: 使用F19核磁共振自由感应衰减数据，分析三个不同晶体取向（特别是磁场平行于[100]晶轴的情况），计算生长参数α
AI.result: 结果强烈支持通用增长假说，磁场平行于[100]晶轴时测得α=3.161×10^4 sec^{-1}，并观察到FID解析延拓中的分支点型奇点
AI.conclusion: 实验验证了Lanczos系数通用增长假说，确定了生长参数α值，并讨论了观测FID解析延拓中奇点所需的特殊实验条件

title: Metadynamics for Vacancy Dynamics in Crystals
summary: We propose a metadynamics-based (MetaD-based) approach for constructing the free energy surface (FES) of vacancy dynamics in crystals. In this approach, the vacancy FES can be constructed without explicitly defining a unique vacancy coordinate or introducing a set of parameters that strongly govern the FES topology, enabled by parallel bias MetaD with partitioned families (PB MetaDPF). In addition, the proposed approach is made more efficient and effective through a multi-hill strategy that exploits crystallographic symmetry. We demonstrate the validity of the proposed approach through applications to self-diffusion and impurity diffusion via monovacancies and divacancies in metallic and ionic crystals.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于元动力学的晶体空位动力学自由能面构建方法，无需明确定义空位坐标或引入强控制参数，通过并行偏置元动力学与分区族技术实现，并利用晶体对称性提高效率。
AI.motivation: 传统方法构建晶体空位自由能面需要明确定义空位坐标和引入控制参数，这些参数强烈影响自由能面拓扑结构，限制了方法的通用性和准确性。
AI.method: 采用并行偏置元动力学与分区族技术，避免明确定义空位坐标；引入多峰策略利用晶体对称性提高计算效率；应用于金属和离子晶体中的单空位和双空位自扩散和杂质扩散。
AI.result: 验证了该方法在构建晶体空位自由能面方面的有效性，能够准确描述空位动力学行为，为自扩散和杂质扩散机制研究提供了可靠工具。
